name: @alalaam/cli
description: alalaam — the Alalaam data engine CLI: sync, validate, derive, and export the evidence graph

sheet.description: Pull and sync the Google Sheet authoring source

figure.description: Add figures to the seed (bootstrap tool — the Sheet is canonical)

link.description: Add connections between figures (bootstrap tool — the Sheet is canonical)

db.description: Load the seed into Cloudflare D1 and manage its migrations (the live layer)
